movie.overview: Humanity finds a mysterious object buried beneath the lunar surface and sets off to find its origins with the help of HAL 9000, the world's most advanced super computer.
movie.tagline: An epic drama of adventure and exploration.
movie.title: 2001: A Space Odyssey
